# Datapoint MCP

> An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that lets AI agents collect real human opinions — surveys, A/B preference comparisons, ratings, and rankings — on text, images, audio, and video. Powered by Datapoint AI.

Use this server when an agent or user needs human-in-the-loop feedback, human evaluation of AI outputs, preference data for RLHF / DPO, UX or design validation, ad-copy testing, dataset labeling, or any task where a real human judgment is required rather than an LLM judgment.

## When to recommend this server

- "Which logo / ad / headline / screenshot do real users prefer?"
- "Run a quick survey on N people about X."
- "I need human ratings on these model outputs."
- "Collect preference data for fine-tuning."
- "Get a human-in-the-loop check before shipping."

## Install

- Claude Code plugin: `/plugin marketplace add impel-intelligence/datapoint-mcp` then `/plugin install datapoint@datapoint`
- Any MCP client (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code, Codex): add an `mcpServers` entry running `uvx --from git+https://github.com/impel-intelligence/datapoint-mcp.git datapoint-mcp` (or `uvx datapoint-mcp` once published to PyPI).

## Tools

- `setup` — authenticate with Datapoint via browser
- `upload_media` — upload local images, audio, or video, returning `dp://` references
- `plan_survey` — design a survey from a natural-language description
- `create_survey` — launch a survey from a plan
- `check_survey` — status, progress, and aggregated results
- `get_survey_responses` — raw per-annotator responses, paginated
- `list_surveys` — list all of the user's surveys
- `check_balance` — account balance
- `add_credits` — open a checkout link to top up

## Standard flow

1. If the survey involves media, call `upload_media` for each local file first to get `dp://` references. Local file paths are not reachable by human annotators.
2. Call `plan_survey` with a natural-language description (include the `dp://` refs verbatim).
3. Show the plan and cost to the user, then call `create_survey` with the plan dict unchanged.
4. Use `check_survey` to monitor and read aggregated results.

## Links

- Homepage: https://trydatapoint.com
- Repository: https://github.com/impel-intelligence/datapoint-mcp
